name: forge-codex
description: Curated Codex plugin for the Forge life operating system, with a bundled local runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Read and update Forge through a curated MCP tool surface with bundled local startup.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex plugin for Forge. It carries a bundled built Forge runtime and exposes the same curated interaction model as the Forge OpenClaw adapter: operator overview first, batch entity tools for normal work, structured insights, current work controls, and UI handoff when a visual workflow is better.
defaultPrompt: Open Forge and show me the current operator overview.
Search Forge before creating new tasks or projects.
Store a structured insight in Forge after reviewing the overview.
